title: alnus fruticosa var. kamtschatica
intro: Alnus fruticosa var. kamtschatica, also known as Kamchatka green alder, is a variety of the alder tree native to the Kamchatka Peninsula in Russia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Kamchatka green alder include the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate coughs. Alnus fruticosa var. kamtschatica can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or salve, and is also used in traditional folk remedies to treat various health conditions.
